mdRecord.dcterms:title: Graduate Catalog, 1967-68
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Bulletin, Vol. 60, No. 3. Graduate course catalog of Virginia Polytechnic University: including campus maps; facility descriptions; lists of courses, schedules, students, and faculty; and other information relating to the operations of the institution. Virginia Polytechnic Institute published couse catalogs as an issue of the Bulletin of the Virginia Polytechnic Institute from April 1908 - October 1989 inclusive.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. Graduate School
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
